Now imagine living in a place that is part of one. Tata La Vida Gurgaon is designed to surround you with nature. This estate offers children a chance to grow up with fruit orchards, and makes greenery part of everyday life: a tree-canopied skywalk for idyllic morning walks, herb gardens for your summer coolers, and lily ponds and flowering trees to welcome you every time you return. 

All across a lush 12-acre estate.City life often makes it difficult for neighbours to become more than just acquaintances. The neighbourhood is very safe, clean and lively. It has hotels, restaurants, cafes, schools, hospitals and colleges etc. in close vicinity.

Having a house in Gurgaon city is a dream for many people. And we make it possible with our well-designed residential properties such as Tata La Vida. Our luxurious residential property, It is designed especially to bring people closer. At the heart of the estate is a terraced green that can be anything from an amphitheatre for events, to a venue for large garden parties. Outdoor lounges dot the landscape: by the reflective pools, in gardens, and at the skywalk. 

The clubhouse is a veritable melting pot with a healthy mix of leisure spaces and sports courts. Even the lobbies and corridors are designed like art gallery aisles to inspire conversations. It is like a dream destination for many people. If you want to give a life full of comfort and luxuries, then this place is for you.

name: Vipul Lavanya
description:
Vipul Lavanya offers a large number of options for those looking to own a home. But very few residential projects stand out for their intrinsic value. Vipul presents Lavanya Apartments - the ideal combination of common sense & aesthetics; intelligent planning and a design that invokes a sense of community. Spread across over 10 acres in Sector-81, right off NH-8 in Gurgaon, Lavanya has excellent connectivity and provides easy access to everything you may need. In a nutshell, Lavanya offers a lot more than just a perfect address, it offers you great value for your money.

The complex is built around a green hub, that provides perfect spaces for the children to play freely and also enhances and furthers the feeling of joy, interaction and sharing among neighbours. Landscaping has been used in such a way that everyday life in the complex is tinged with green lawns that extend right upto the buildings, colourful connecting walkways, and drop-off areas that give you a pleasant and verdant welcome every single day. 

Right from community and connectivity to various drop points, Lavanya offers a complete, self sufficient set-up. With convenient shopping centre and a dedicated club house, with facilities like swimming pool, health club with steam & jacuzzi, gym, tennis & squash court, pool tables, offer ample opportunity to exercise and rejuvenate.

Vipul Group

Since its formation in 2001, Vipul has been and is continuing to drive value for its associates, clients and employees. With its entrepreneurial fervor, the group endeavors in Real Estate, Facility Management. The group’s vision is to provide end to end solutions leading to higher returns with the mission to endorse its practice of encouraging innovative ventures with prudence. Vipul Limited, a synonym for HAPPY BUILDINGS, is a company constantly spreading happiness over the years through their landmark developments. With aggressive plans to expand across the national boundaries Vipul has already delivered about 6 Million Sq. Ft. and is presently working on an area of about 10Million Sq. Ft. through Integrated Townships.

The luxury of living in nature. The convenience of being surrounded by life-simplifying amenities. The satisfaction of enjoying a secure and peaceful lifestyle with the ones you love. That’s life in The Leaf by SS Group. Created taking inspiration from the best designer of all – Nature, The Leaf is developed with a single-minded objective of giving you a lavish lifestyle in clean green surroundings.

The location of The Leaf is one of the factors that works greatly in its favour. Situated in Sector 85 of New Gurgaon, it is only 2 kilometers from the National Highway 8 and has direct access to the Dwarka-Gurgaon State Highway. It is only 25 minutes away from IGI Airport and only 10 minutes from the state Railway Station. A metro hub and an inter-state bus terminus are coming up in its vicinity.

description:
Trehan Iris Omara situatd in Sector 80, Gurgaon is a master planned community where the layout is balanced with towers, internal roads and open landscape zones. The site is three-side open which helps in natural ventilation, sunlight and visual openness around the residential towers. Internal planning is focused on green corridors, buffer landscaping along the boundary and pedestrian friendly circulation paths. This reduces conflict with vehicular movement. Omara is marketed with spacious 3 BHK and 4 BHK apartment formats that cater to different family sizes and requirements. The layouts focus on efficient circulation. They have clear separation of living, dining, bedroom, and service zones. Movement inside the home stays comfortable and logical. Many units are planned as three-side open configurations. This helps with cross ventilation and good daylighting across the main rooms and balconies. Omara in Sector 80 follows the same philosophy. It aims to balance luxury, wellness and community living within one secure campus. The project is spread over a large land parcel in Sector 80. It is part of the developer’s larger vision to create modern homes in upcoming growth corridors across NCR. So both end users and investors have the comfort that the brand has long term plans for the region.

The master plan also has a central clubhouse, garden spaces and recreational pockets spread across the complex. Residents don’t feel restricted to one corner for daily activities. Underground utilities, planned drainage and service corridors are designed. This keeps the surface level clutter free and safe for kids and senior citizens. This is the style of planning for modern mid to premium segment communities in Gurgaon. It appeals to families looking for a long term primary home. Sector 80 is situated on NH-8, between the older parts of Gurgaon and Manesar industrial belt. For working professionals, this means shorter drives to Cyber City, Udyog Vihar, IMT Manesar and newer office clusters on the highway and Southern Peripheral Road. The sector also connects to other growth corridors like Dwarka Expressway on one side and Sohna Road and Golf Course Extension Road through internal roads.

name: Adani The Marq
short_descrip: Luxury Project Named The MARQ launched by Adani on Sector 102A Dwarka Expressway introduces an elevated way of living in one of NCR’s most dynamic growth corridors. Rising gracefully to a height of 158.88 metres, among the tallest residential towers in the region, Adani Dwarka Expressway Gurugram enjoys a rare low-density setting with effortless connectivity to Delhi, IGI Airport, NH-48, SPR, and New Gurugram. Surrounded by transformative landmarks such as Global City, the upcoming metro corridor, India’s largest ISBT at Sector 36A, AIIMS, the Diplomatic Enclave, and Yashobhoomi Convention Centre
description:
The Marq by adani in Sector 102 Dwarka Expressway Gurgaon is a premium luxury residential project by Adani Realty, located in one of the most promising corridors of Gurgaon along the Dwarka Expressway. Planned as a low-density development, the project is spread across 5 acres and comprises only two iconic high-rise towers with G+46 floors, offering just 350 exclusive residences. The project focuses on spacious living, privacy, and a strong connection with nature, featuring 85% open spaces and uninterrupted lifetime green views.

The development offers meticulously designed 3 and 4 BHK apartments ranging from 2375 to 3295 sq. ft., with thoughtfully planned layouts that include servant rooms and lounge spaces in select configurations. Every home is designed with East and West-facing balconies, ensuring excellent natural light and ventilation throughout the day.

Surrounded by nearly 500 acres of agricultural and institutional land, Adani The Marq provides a serene living environment while remaining well-connected to major business hubs, Delhi, and IGI Airport. Backed by reputed partners such as Morphogenesis (architecture), Oracle (landscape), and ACC (construction), the project reflects superior planning, quality, and long-term value.
highlights:
Low-density development with only 350 apartments

85% open & green spaces for a healthier lifestyle

Lifetime green views, surrounded by ~500 acres of agricultural & institutional land

Only East & West-facing balconies for optimal sunlight

2 Swimming Pools (including temperature-controlled pool)

3-level basement parking with ~800 car parking spaces

Construction Partner: ACC (India’s most trusted cement & construction brand)

Architecture: Morphogenesis (globally awarded architectural firm)

Landscape Design: Oracle (known for sustainable and open green planning)
advantages:
Direct connectivity to Dwarka Expressway

Well-connected to IGI Airport & Delhi

Easy reach to NH-48 and SPR Road

Close to upcoming metro corridors

Nearby reputed schools, hospitals & business hubs

Future-ready location with strong infrastructure growth

Surrounded by 500 acres of green agricultural & institutional land

name: The Rising Palm Floors
short_descrip: The Rising Palm Floors in Gurgaon provide spacious, low-rise homes ideal for modern living. Due to its meticulous planning, it encompasses environment friendly framework and is located at a prime place; it would be a great investment for anyone seeking to own a quiet and comfortable residence in Gurgaon. The Rising Palm Sector 95A Price List offers competitive rates for luxury living with world-class amenities.

Due to its meticulous planning, it encompasses environment friendly framework and is located at a prime place; it would be a great investment for anyone seeking to own a quiet and comfortable residence in Gurgaon. name: MRG Crown
short_descrip: MRG Crown Sector 106, Gurgaon is a premium low-rise residential project by MRG Group, located on the fast-developing Dwarka Expressway. Spread across approximately 8.5 acres, the project offers well-designed 3 BHK independent floors with modern layouts and high-end specifications. Designed by renowned architect Hafeez Contractor, it combines luxury with functionality, featuring a large clubhouse, green landscapes, walking tracks, and lifestyle amenities.

name: Eldeco Terra & Sol
short_descrip: Eldeco Group introduces an iconic luxury residential development in Sector 80, Gurgaon, featuring palatial 3 BR world residences with a unique Japanese-inspired Onigiri architectural design. Spread across 2.7 acres with only two exclusive towers, every home is a corner residence offering expansive layouts, wraparound balconies, and panoramic open views. The project is thoughtfully designed with oversized rooms, spacious utility areas, minimal surface vehicular movement, and dedicated two-car parking for a refined living experience.
description: Eldeco Group presents Eldeco Terra & Sol Reserve — an exclusive collection of ultra-luxury 3 & 3 BHK + Servant residences, gracefully spread across 2.78 acres of beautifully landscaped greens. Nestled in the prime locale of Sector 80, Gurugram, this premium development combines contemporary architecture with panoramic views of the golf course and the picturesque Aravalli hills. Designed for discerning homeowners who appreciate space, elegance, and privacy, the project features a thoughtfully planned low-density community with only 40 residences per acre, creating a serene and sophisticated living experience. Every home is meticulously crafted with premium specifications, including imported flooring, modular kitchens, and advanced VRV air-conditioning systems, delivering the perfect blend of luxury, comfort, and modern living.
highlights:
• Only 2 tower in 2.7 acres with 4-to-a-crore units’ placement
  • Situated on 3 side open plot with 24-meter wide access road
  • All homes are corner homes with infinite views
  • Largest room sizes & balcony decks in the category
  • Well-designed kitchen connected to largest utility in the category
  • Angled wraparound balconies for maximum views and sunlight
  • Balcony decks up to 100+ ft. long, offering larger living spaces
  • Minimal vehicular movement on surface to create least disturbance
  • Dedicated 2 car parking for every residence
advantages:
• Spacious living and dining areas
  • Large balconies for open views
  • Modular kitchen layouts
  • Well-ventilated rooms
  • Premium fittings and interiors
  • Grand clubhouse with social spaces
  • Swimming pool with relaxation deck
  • Fully equipped fitness center
  • Yoga and meditation zones
